text: Maintaining a healthy lifestyle involves several important elements. First, a balanced diet is essential. Try to eat plenty of fruits, vegetables, and whole grains while limiting processed foods high in sugar. Second, regular exercise keeps your body strong and improves your mood; a 30-minute walk every day can make a big difference. Sleep is also crucial—most adults need seven to nine hours each night. Equally important is mental health, so make time for relaxation and activities you enjoy. Finally, achieve a good work-life balance by setting boundaries between your job and personal time. Remember, small changes can lead to lasting health improvement.
